overall.description: A third-person gameplay clip from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character exploring a misty mountain canyon. The character stands on a rocky cliff edge overlooking a river valley, then proceeds to walk along a narrow cliff path and cross a wooden rope bridge spanning the gorge.

agents.ego_description: standing still on the cliff edge looking out over the misty canyon valley

entered.detail: rocky precipice where the character stands overlooking the valley
deep gorge with steep rock walls and morning mist
narrow waterway running through the bottom of the canyon
tall evergreen tree on the left side of the frame
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a rocky cliff edge overlooking a vast misty canyon. A river winds through the gorge below, framed by pine trees and distant mountains under a partly cloudy morning sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon overlook with misty valley views

events.description: camera begins panning right to survey the canyon landscape, character temporarily out of view

agents.ego_description: character not visible in frame, camera panning to survey the surrounding landscape

entered.detail: steep rock faces on the left side of the canyon
cluster of evergreen trees on the distant right ridge
atmospheric fog hanging in the canyon valley
wooden steps built into the cliffside on the opposite side
suspension bridge spanning the canyon gap in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera pans right across the canyon, revealing misty depths and a rope bridge spanning the gorge. Rocky cliffs and pine trees frame the view as the morning light filters through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cliffside trail with steep drop

events.description: character comes back into view and begins walking along the narrow cliff path

agents.ego_description: walking carefully along the narrow dirt path hugging the cliff edge

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding along the cliff edge
distant peaks with snow visible on their summits
large boulder formation beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow cliffside path with the canyon falling away to the left. The rope bridge grows closer ahead, while snow-capped mountains become visible in the distance beyond the gorge.

events.description: character steps onto the wooden rope bridge to cross the canyon

agents.ego_description: carefully walking across the wooden planks of the rope bridge spanning the deep canyon

entered.detail: steep drop visible through the bridge planks below
tall metal structure visible on the distant ridge
weathered wooden decking of the rope bridge

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto the rope bridge and begins crossing the canyon gap. The wooden planks creak underfoot with the canyon depths visible below, while a distant metal tower stands on the horizon against the cloudy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a stationary overlook of a misty canyon to a precarious crossing of a rope bridge. It begins with the character standing on a rocky cliff edge overlooking a winding river and pine-covered gorge under a partly cloudy morning sky. As the camera pans right, the misty depths of the canyon are revealed, bringing a distant rope bridge into view while morning light filters through the haze. The scene then shifts as the character walks along a narrow cliffside path, with the canyon falling away to the left and snow-capped mountains emerging on the distant horizon. Finally, the camera follows the character as they step onto the creaking wooden planks of the bridge to cross the gap, revealing a distant metal tower against the cloudy sky.
